title: Junior Business Development Manager at ATS Infrastructure

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at ATS Infrastructure
jsonLd.description:
ATS Infrastructure has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ATS Infrastructure:
ATS Infrastructure is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure!
